arts.ttl: Report Man Utd sent scouts to watch Fiorentina defender multiple times
arts.sum: Manchester United have reportedly scouted Fiorentina and Italy defender Pietro Comuzzo multiple times this season....

arts.ttl: Man United drop Alejandro Garnacho Man City team news hint after Ruben Amorim concern
arts.sum: The latest Manchester United news as Alejandro Garnacho looks to be in-line to start vs Manchester City after a huge social media hint.

arts.ttl: Manchester City 'identify' perfect Kevin De Bruyne replacement as Hugo Viana task becomes clear
arts.sum: Latest Manchester City news and rumours including the latest on the club's hunt for Kevin De Bruyne's replacement after the midfielder announced he will be leaving at the end of the season

arts.ttl: Man Utd vs Man City LIVE: Rivals clash in Manchester derby amid Premier League struggles
arts.sum: United and City face off in the Manchester derby as Pep Guardiola’s side look to take a step closer to European qualification

arts.ttl: Arsenal dragged into Man City trial scandal
arts.sum: Manchester City have dragged Arsenal and other Premier League clubs into the scandal that could see the champions relegated and stripped of titles. According to The Times, City have accused the Premier League of ignoring unfair financial contributions that Arsenal, Everton, Brighton and Leicester have received.

arts.ttl: Man Utd vs Man City: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Manchester United and Manchester City lock horns in the second Manchester derby of the Premier League season on Sunday. United will be eager to do the double over their local rivals, even if victory means little beyond bragging rights in the course of an underwhelming Premier League campaign.

arts.ttl: Man Utd vs Man City predicted XIs with Kevin De Bruyne decision made for final derby
arts.sum: Manchester United take on local rivals Manchester City on Sunday in what will be Kevin De Bruyne's final derby after it was announced that he will be leaving in the summer

arts.ttl: ‘You are a bad man’ – Sir Alex Ferguson lets ITV host have it after Man United question
arts.sum: Sir Alex Ferguson was on hand to watch his horse Regent's Stroll finish second at Aintree, before being asked a cheeky question about Manchester United's form

arts.ttl: FC Porto wants to ‘scare’ Manchester United and PSG with €80-100m claus
arts.sum: Rodrigo Mora has impressed for Porto this season and has already attracted attention from Manchester United. The 17-year-old has played 16 league games and has five goals and three assists. He’s also played five times in the Europa League earlier in the season. arts.ttl: Man United 'eye Championship goalkeeper and Gareth Southgate's godson' as potential back-up to Andre Onana
arts.sum: A former England Under-20s World Cup winner from 2017, the goalkeeper is also Gareth Southgate 's godson.
